description: Elastic constants from MLIP 600K snapshot method (paper values) and DFT 0K clamped-ion

mlip_600K_snapshot.method: 600K MD -> 5 snapshots -> quench -> FIRE relax -> finite-strain Cij -> VRH average
mlip_600K_snapshot.trend: E: 29.1 > 28.6 > 27.3 > 26.4 > 25.8 -> Br up, E down (perfectly consistent)

dft_0K_clamped.key_finding: C44 most sensitive: 47% change. Li ordering -> shear resistance. Compression (K) only 2.6% change.

dft_0K_notes: DFT 0K clamped-ion overestimates C44 (39.9 vs literature 7.8 GPa) due to ordered Li -> cooperative shear. MLIP 600K snapshot resolves this.

intrinsic_vs_extrinsic.intrinsic: Br up -> E down (consistent in both calc and expt within same family)
intrinsic_vs_extrinsic.extrinsic: Li5.4 > Li6 in experiment (reversed!) due to GB pinning by vacancy
intrinsic_vs_extrinsic.notes: Same family: intrinsic dominates. Cross-family: extrinsic (microstructure) can reverse trend.
